description_long: This is a large, modern residential house with a flat roof and clean, rectangular lines. The property features a spacious main building surrounded by landscaped greenery, including several trees and shrubs. A prominent feature is the adjacent tennis court, bordered by a low hedge, which adds a recreational aspect to the property. The house has multiple large windows arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern, allowing for ample natural light. The main entryway is marked by a set of steps leading up to a central door, flanked by decorative plants and possibly a small porch area. The overall design is contemporary, with an emphasis on open space and outdoor amenities.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with large windows, landscaped greenery, and an adjacent tennis court. The design is spacious and contemporary, emphasizing outdoor living.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, steps, decorative plants, and the tennis court in the background.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the house, the flat roof, and the full extent of the tennis court.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the tennis court in the foreground and the back of the house with visible windows and greenery.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the house's depth, flat roof, and the tennis court to the left.
attribute_entryway_design: Central door with steps, flanked by decorative plants and a small porch area
